title: Smoky Spanish Cod Ceviche
description: A fresh, flaky ceviche featuring smoky paprika and aromatic cloves, perfect for midnight cravings while staying sugarfree.

ingredients.name: cod fillets
ingredients.notes: fresh, skin removed, cut into 1‑cm cubes

instructions: Place the cod cubes in a shallow glass or ceramic bowl.
Add the lime juice, olive oil, smoked paprika, ground cloves, minced garlic, sea salt, and black pepper; stir to coat evenly.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate to marinate for 20 minutes; the acid will ‘cook’ the fish.
After marination, add the diced red onion, chopped cilantro, and chili flakes if using; gently fold to combine.
Taste and adjust seasoning with extra salt or pepper if needed.
Serve immediately over a bed of mixed greens or in a chilled glass for a sophisticated presentation.
If desired, garnish with a few extra cilantro leaves or a thin lime wheel for extra zing.
Consume within 30 minutes for best texture and freshness.
